import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { Subscriber } from '../Subscriber'; import { OperatorFunction } from '../types'; /** * Used to determine if an object is an Observable with a lift function. */ export declare function hasLift(source: any): source is { lift: InstanceType<typeof Observable>['lift']; }; /** * Creates an `OperatorFunction`. Used to define operators throughout the library in a concise way. * @param init The logic to connect the liftedSource to the subscriber at the moment of subscription. */ export declare function operate<T, R>(init: (liftedSource: Observable<T>, subscriber: Subscriber<R>) => (() => void) | void): OperatorFunction<T, R>; //# sourceMappingURL=lift.d.ts.map
